# CrawlerOptic

> The free, professional tool for generating llms.txt files and optimizing websites for AI crawlers including GPT, Claude, and Gemini.

## Site Information

- **URL:** https://crawleroptic.com
- **Domain:** crawleroptic.com
- **Category:** Developer Tools / AI SEO / Web Optimization

## Primary Topics (H1)

- AI Crawler Optimization
- llms.txt File Generation
- AI-First SEO Strategy
- LLM Visibility Tools

- How AI Crawlers Work in 2026
- Benefits of llms.txt
- GPT, Claude, and Gemini Crawler Differences
- llms.txt Best Practices
- Website Metadata Extraction
